title: Wholesome Velvety-Pungent Wood-Fire-Roasted-Beef Pilaf
description: This one-pot Portuguese dish features a blend of pungent and velvety flavors, incorporating wood-fired roasted beef with aromatic rice wine into a wholesome rice pilaf.
instructions: Season beef with salt and pepper, then brush lightly with vegetable oil. Roast in preheated oven for 35 minutes.
Heat a wok or large pan over medium-high heat, add oil. Stir-fry onion until translucent. Add garlic and ginger; sauté for about 1 minute.
Stir in ground pork and cook until no longer pink. Remove from heat.
Add roasted beef to the wok with its juices, rice wine, brown sugar, soy sauce, and remaining salt. Stir-fry briefly then add rice, cover, and simmer over low heat for 20 minutes.
Remove lid, stir occasionally for another 5-7 minutes until liquid is absorbed. Serve hot.
